title: HeadyBuddy — Your Intelligent AI Companion
description: Meet HeadyBuddy: an AI companion with 7 animal cognitive archetypes, persistent memory, and cross-device presence. Not a chatbot — a companion that learns, adapts, and grows with you.
ogTitle: HeadyBuddy — An AI That Actually Knows You
ogDescription: 7 cognitive archetypes. Persistent memory. Cross-device presence. HeadyBuddy is the companion AI that grows with you.
